name: NEON OVERDRIVE
description: Neon Overdrive: Doom Chasers is a fast-paced cyberpunk parkour platformer where reflexes decide survival. Dash, double-jump, and sprint across procedurally generated neon platforms while a deadly laser chases you relentlessly. Collect stars, unlock new levels, earn coins, and customize your runner with stylish neon skins. Featuring smooth controls, dynamic difficulty, particle effects, and a futuristic synth soundscape, Neon Overdrive delivers an intense arcade experience on both desktop and mobile. How far can you run before the system overloads?
instructions: PC A D or larr rarr Move Space W uarr Jump Shift Dash P Esc Pause Mobile On-screen buttons Move Tap screen Jump Button Dash
